Merchant Guide
& Documentation

A complete walkthrough of the NearPop Merchant Dashboard — from sign-up to posting live deals and tracking customer analytics.

Audience: Business Owners URL: nearpop.in Version: 1.0 April 2026
Overview Sign In Shop Setup Dashboard Wallet Smart Storefront Analytics Create Listing QR Standee Feature Summary
00

Merchant Platform Overview

NearPop's Merchant Dashboard lets any local business post deals, rentals, PG listings, or job openings that are automatically pushed as GPS-triggered popups to customers walking nearby. No app download required — fully web-based with real-time analytics.

📊
Live Dashboard
Real-time stats: views, visits, interest & engagement rate
💰
Prepaid Wallet
Add funds; each popup costs just 10 paisa
📍
GPS Popups
Listings auto-notify customers within your set radius
🏷️
Create Listings
Post deals, flats, PG stays, or job openings instantly
📱
Smart Storefront QR
Unique QR standee for counter — no app needed
📈
QR Analytics
Track scans, new users, returning visitors & menu opens
01

Merchant Sign-In

Authentication

Select Merchant & Sign In

Visit nearpop.in and select the Merchant tab (right button). Accept Terms, then authenticate with Google.

  • Select Merchant (not Customer)
  • Check the Terms & Privacy checkbox
  • Click "Continue with Google"
  • Choose your Google account from the popup
Google OAuth

Google Account Chooser

Standard Google sign-in popup appears. Tap your account for instant, passwordless authentication via OAuth 2.0.

  • Secure OAuth 2.0 — no passwords stored
  • Existing accounts shown for one-tap login
  • "Use another account" if needed
02

First-Time Shop Setup

Onboarding

Enter Your Business Name

First-time merchants are prompted to enter their business/shop name. This becomes your Merchant identity across the entire platform.

  • A browser dialog asks: "What is your business / shop name?"
  • Type your store name (e.g. RajMandir)
  • Click OK to proceed to your dashboard
  • This is a one-time setup — name appears on your dashboard and QR standee

Important: Choose your business name carefully — it appears on your QR standee and is visible to customers. It can be updated later from your account settings.

03

Merchant Dashboard

Main Hub

Dashboard Overview

Your command centre. Shows real-time performance metrics, wallet balance, and links to all merchant tools. The orange header displays your business name and a Logout button.

  • Active Listings — number of live posts
  • Map Views — how many users saw you on map
  • Store Visits — physical footfall tracked
  • Visit Rate % — conversion from view to visit
  • Customer Journey — funnel: Discovered → Interested → Engaged → Visited
  • Switch to "View as Customer" to preview your listing
04

Wallet & Payments

Prepaid Wallet

Add Funds & Checkout

NearPop runs on a prepaid wallet model. Each popup notification sent to a nearby customer costs exactly 10 paisa (₹0.10). Top up your wallet anytime to keep your listings active.

Choose a top-up amount: ₹500 / ₹1,000 / ₹2,000 / ₹5,000

Pay via UPI (GPay/PhonePe/Paytm), Credit/Debit Card, or Net Banking

  • Tap + Add Funds on the dashboard
  • Select amount: ₹500 · ₹1,000 · ₹2,000 · ₹5,000
  • Payment methods: UPI · Credit/Debit Card · Net Banking
  • Wallet balance updates instantly after payment
  • Each popup to a nearby user = ₹0.10 deducted
  • Daily budget per listing controls your daily spend cap
After Top-Up

Updated Wallet Balance

Once funds are added, the wallet balance reflects immediately on the dashboard. Your listings stay active as long as balance is available.

  • Balance displayed prominently on every dashboard page
  • Low balance warning when funds are running out
  • Multiple top-ups stack — balance never expires
05

Smart Storefront & QR Standee

Physical Presence

Smart Storefront Section

Once your shop is live, NearPop provides a permanent QR code for your physical counter. This bridges online discovery with in-store experience.

  • "Your shop is live!" banner confirms activation
  • Print Standee — generates a printable QR card
  • Show In-Store — displays QR fullscreen on device
  • QR routes customers to your live deals OR gives them visit points
  • Permanent QR — doesn't change even when deals change
06

QR Analytics

Data & Insights

QR Scan Analytics

Track exactly how customers interact with your QR standee. Understand new vs. returning visitors and storefront engagement — all in real time.

  • Total Scans — all-time QR scan count
  • New Users Acquired — first-time NearPop signups via your QR
  • Returning Users — existing users who scanned again
  • Store Menu Opens — how many viewed your digital storefront
  • Your Listings section below with "+ Create New" shortcut
07

Creating a Listing

Post a Deal

Listing Type & Details

Go to nearpop.in/create to post a new listing. Choose your listing type, add a photo, write a title and description.

  • 4 listing types: Shop Deal · Flat/Room · PG/Hostel · Job Opening
  • Photo upload (optional) — tap to upload a picture
  • Title: clear, catchy headline (e.g. "30% Off Today!")
  • Description: details of your offer or listing
  • Price/Offer field (or enter "MRP" for no fixed price)
  • Contact Number for interested customers
Targeting & Budget

Radius, Budget & Location

The second half of the listing form controls how far your deal reaches, how much you spend per day, and confirms your exact location on a map.

Title, description, price, contact number and notification radius fields

Daily budget, offer validity dates, and drag-to-pin location map

  • Notification Radius — slider sets how far popups are sent (e.g. 500 metres)
  • Daily Budget (₹) — must be a multiple of ₹25; each popup costs 10 paisa
  • Offer Valid Until — choose 7/30/60/90 days or Unlimited
  • Your Location — drag the pin on the map to your exact store location
  • Tap 🚀 Go Live Now! to publish instantly
08

Store QR Standee

Physical Marketing

Printable QR Standee

NearPop auto-generates a branded, printable standee card unique to your store. Place it on your counter — customers scan it to see your deals and earn points.

  • Branded with NearPop logo and your store name
  • Unique QR code specific to your merchant profile
  • Tagline: "Scan to see today's deals & claim points!"
  • "No App Download Required" — works in any browser
  • Print from dashboard: Dashboard → Smart Storefront → Print Standee
  • Every scan is tracked in your QR Analytics section

Pro Tip: Place the QR standee at eye level on your billing counter. Customers who scan earn NearPop loyalty points — incentivising repeat scans and driving more analytics data for you.

09
